title: OCI Unusual API Caller - First Seen User-Agent
description: Identifies API calls from user-agents that have not been seen in the baseline period, which may indicate new tooling or unauthorized API access.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' | stats earliest(Time) as first_seen, count as call_count by 'User Agent' | where call_count < 5 | sort -first_seen
notes: Baseline user-agents over 30 days first. New entries may indicate compromised credentials being used from a new tool.
